summary: Testing completed for news/security features. All backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified - Alerts panel renamed, buckets grouped, map alert layer toggle functional. News includes Al Jazeera (9 articles) and The News Pakistan (10 articles). Security alerts show 5 bucket types (security, political, diplomatic, economic, energy). Petroleum dealer headlines correctly classified as 'economic'. Alert popup code verified to include category/type.
passed_tests: News includes Al Jazeera source (9 articles)
News includes The News Pakistan source (10 articles)
News filtering removes entertainment/sports (0 unfiltered items found)
Security returns 12 alerts with correct structure
Alerts have required fields: type, severity, title, region
All 5 bucket types present: security, political, diplomatic, economic, energy
Petroleum dealer headline classified as 'economic' (not diplomatic)
Alert severity levels correct: high, medium, low
Energy bucket captures power/electricity related alerts
Security panel renamed to 'Alerts' in frontend
Alerts panel shows grouped bucket sections with headers
Map legend includes 'Alerts' entry with red dot
Alert layer toggle button exists and works (On/Off)
Side panels maintain balanced height on smaller screens (568px at tablet)
Alert popup code includes category/type in template
context_for_next_testing_agent: News and Security/Alerts features fully implemented. Backend: PAKISTAN_NEWS_FEEDS includes Al Jazeera and 2 The News feeds. classify_security_bucket() prioritizes economic bucket for petroleum/dealer keywords. Frontend: SecurityPanel.js renamed to show 'Alerts' header and groups alerts by bucket. MapSection.js shows alert markers with layer toggle and popup showing category. All tests pass.
